case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ROSA MACIAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACIAS, ROSA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT - NOT FILED. RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT.
